title: Electroporation of Vibrio natriegens (Weinstock et al. 2016, modified)
author: Benjamin Daniel
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ptmdnk6
materials: Chill the culture on ice for 15 min
Adjust volume for a OD of 16

steps.title: 10 mL BHI (Brain haert infusion)...
steps.instruction: 10 mL BHI (Brain haert infusion) + v2 salts Overnight culture

steps.title: Inoculation of a new BHI +...
steps.instruction: Inoculation of a new BHI + v2 media with 1% of the overnight culture as inoculum.

steps.title: Grow at 37°C shaking to an OD of 0
steps.instruction: Grow at 37°C shaking to an OD of 0.5

steps.title: Use a chilled (4°C) centrifuge at 4,500 r
steps.instruction: Use a chilled (4°C) centrifuge at 4,500 r.p.m. for 20 min

steps.title: Decant the supernatant diligently and carefully
steps.instruction: Decant the supernatant diligently and carefully

steps.title: Resuspend gently in 5-10 mL Electroporation-Buffer...
steps.instruction: Resuspend gently in 5-10 mL Electroporation-Buffer (680 mM sucrose, 7 mM K2HPO4, pH 7), then fill the falcon tube to the top.

steps.title: To wash, spin again at 4
steps.instruction: To wash, spin again at 4.500 r.p.m. for 15 min at 4 °C, then resuspend gently in 5 mL Electroporation-Buffer. Repeat washing twice for a total of three times.

steps.title: Spin again at 4
steps.instruction: Spin again at 4.500 r.p.m. for 15 min at 4 °C, decant supernatant and resuspend carefully in the residual buffer.

steps.title: Aliquot in chilled Micro-Reaction-Tubes, then snap freeze in liquid nitrogen
steps.instruction: Aliquot in chilled Micro-Reaction-Tubes, then snap freeze in liquid nitrogen

steps.title: remove one aliquot with electrocompetent cells from storage
steps.instruction: remove one aliquot with electrocompetent cells from storage

steps.title: Electroporation is done with the following parameters
steps.instruction: Electroporation is done with the following parameters: 700 (–900) V, 25 μF, 200 Ω in a 1mm cuvette

steps.title: Recover for one hour at 37°C...
steps.instruction: Recover for one hour at 37°C in brain heart infusion with v2 salts
